codeReview.summary: The commit adds explicit implementation-commit traceability requirements to all five mission worker skill guides, including conditions, procedure, and compliance handling when commitId points to an artifact commit. This aligns with the feature’s traceability objective and introduces no code-path regressions (documentation-only changes).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Implementation-commit traceability guidance was duplicated across five worker skills but not centralized in a shared base skill, which can create future drift if one copy is updated and others are not.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 350f9d17674cc191a2a5ada195d2dbab0286e0cc modifies only .factory/skills/{token-accounting,indexing-efficiency,switcher-integration,switcher-core,switcher-ui}-worker/SKILL.md. Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges also notes mirroring to mission-worker-base for reuse.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for misc-enforce-worker-implementation-commit-traceability. Feature implementation is compliant and review status is pass; one non-blocking shared-state observation was recorded about centralizing duplicated guidance.
